case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. SALOME ESTILONG FORLANDA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FORLANDA, SALOME ESTILONG $422.98 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $502.98 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2019 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-12-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANGEL GARCIA LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT SALOME ESTILONG FORLANDA IS NOT PRESENT. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED AT THIS TIME. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
